message:
fix: wait for Dolt MySQL readiness and always pass --server-port to bd init

Replace the PID-based IsRunning check with a MySQL ping retry loop (10s
timeout) so bd init does not race against a Dolt server that was just started
by gt install. Also extract buildBdInitArgs() to always resolve the correct
port via doltserver.DefaultConfig() instead of only forwarding GT_DOLT_PORT.

Fixes #2572, fixes #2573

Co-Authored-By: Rob LaRubbio <larubbio@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
